sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me first understand the current state better
# Character is at rows 47-61, cols 14-28
# Green frame is at rows 29-49, cols 41-49
# I need to move the character to align with the green frame

# Let me try moving UP by 15 rows and RIGHT by 13 columns
# But first, let me check if the character can move freely

# Let me try a small probe first
action(['UP'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After UP:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  {n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
